calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond.
Orlando Ortega, Esq., for Petitioners Sung Chul Lim and Sun Young Lim.
Mr. Lim is also present, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Alison Yun-Hee Lim.
Decree signed in open court.
